message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "Line of Business" as LOB
participant "ESB" as ESB
participant "Scoring" as Scoring
participant "Recertification" as Recertification

subgraph Compliance_IT
    LOB -> ESB: UpdatePartyKYC includeScore=true
    alt [Recertification completed]
        ESB -> LOB: UpdatePartyKYC includeScore=true recertificationStatus=completed actor=<userid> reason=<one of client-initiated trigger codes>
    end
    LOB -> Scoring: 1 score
    Note over Scoring, Recertification: Schedule a new recertification and calculate its due date OR retrieve due date of an existing recertification if one has been previously scheduled and not yet completed or cancelled
    Scoring -> Recertification: 2 recertify
    Recertification -> Scoring: 3 evaluate rules
    Scoring -> LOB: 8 score + recertification
    alt [Recertification is Needed]
        Recertification -> Scoring: 4 schedule a new recertification
        alt [Existing Recertification]
            Recertification -> Scoring: 5 retrieve a previously scheduled recertification that hasn't been completed or cancelled
        end
        alt [Complete a Recertification]
            Recertification -> Scoring: 6 complete an established recertification
            Note right of Recertification: Immediately complete the recertification if the LOB told us it was already done
        end
        Scoring -> LOB: 7 recertification details
    end
    alt [Recertification is Not Needed]
        Scoring -> LOB: 9 no recertification
        LOB -> Scoring: 10 score
    end
endsubgraph

@enduml
